message:
test(doom/player): add 19 tests for tick() physics, collision, and movement (bd-1tf2g)

Cover tick() friction, momentum clamping, tiny-speed kill, noclip
movement, gravity when airborne, landing reset, bob accumulation/
decay/cap, no-gravity-on-ground. Cover try_move() collision with
blocking walls, free movement in center, noclip wall pass-through.
Cover move_forward/strafe negative directions, look yaw wrapping,
pitch clamp symmetry, and friction convergence over 100 ticks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
